plan_adherence_notes: All 10 planned steps were completed. 9 new tests added to System.test.tsx covering health loading/error/success states, markets loading, formatCurrency integration, CountCard colors, empty markets edge case, and API info section. All 14 tests pass (5 existing + 9 new). Minor deviation: step 7 (CountCard color) uses DOM traversal with querySelectorAll instead of a cleaner selector, but achieves the goal.
missed_questions: Whether to add data-testid attributes to CountCard or beacon elements for more robust selectors (step 7 DOM traversal is fragile)
Whether to test route count badges in the API Surface section (only route names were tested, not counts)
Whether to test the health check polling/refetch interval behavior
reason: All 9 planned tests were implemented and all 14 tests pass. The implementation faithfully follows the plan which was well-grounded in research. Tests cover health states (loading, error with Error, error with non-Error, success), markets loading, formatCurrency integration, CountCard styling, empty markets edge case, and API surface rendering. The only minor concerns are fragile DOM traversal in the CountCard test and a few untested edge cases (route count badges, polling behavior), but these are outside the original task scope.
